title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your preferences and application configuration

systemConfig.title: System Configuration
systemConfig.description: Configure core system settings like timezone and debug mode.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.description: Affects log timestamps, scheduled tasks, and date displays throughout the application.

debug.label: Debug Mode
debug.enable: Enable verbose logging and detailed error messages
debug.warning: ⚠️ Requires application restart to take effect. Only enable for troubleshooting.

theme.label: Theme
theme.description: Choose between light and dark theme. Your preference is saved automatically.

units.label: Unit System
units.imperialDescription: Using imperial units: gallons, miles, MPG, °F, PSI, lbs, lb-ft
units.metricDescription: Using metric units: liters, kilometers, L/100km, °C, bar, kg, Nm
units.showBothDescription: Display values in both imperial and metric (e.g., "25 MPG (9.4 L/100km)")

language.label: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred display language. Community translations may be incomplete.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Choose your preferred currency for displaying costs and prices.
currency.confirmMessage: This changes how all costs are displayed. It does not convert existing values between currencies.

mobile.title: Mobile Experience
mobile.description: Customize how the app behaves on mobile devices.
mobile.quickEntryDescription: After signing in on a mobile device, go directly to Quick Entry instead of the dashboard

family.title: Family Management
family.description: Manage family members, user accounts, and dashboard visibility.

auth.title: Authentication Mode
auth.description: Configure how users access and authenticate with MyGarage.
auth.restartWarning: ⚠️ Requires application restart to take effect.
auth.noneDetectedDescription: MyGarage is running behind a reverse proxy authenticator. Authentication modes are only needed if you require additional access control beyond your existing setup.
auth.noneWarningDescription: Anyone with network access can view and modify data in MyGarage. Consider enabling Local Authentication or placing MyGarage behind an authenticator like Authelia or Authentik.
auth.localDescription: Local authentication allows users to log in with a username and password stored locally.
auth.oidcDescription: Configure single sign-on with your identity provider (Authentik, Keycloak, Auth0, Okta, etc.)

archive.title: Archived Vehicles
archive.description: View and manage vehicles you've archived (sold, totaled, gifted, etc.). Archived vehicles remain in analytics but can be hidden from the main list.

secretKey.label: Secret Key:
secretKey.description: Automatically generated and stored at {{path}}, or set via the MYGARAGE_SECRET_KEY environment variable. The key persists across application restarts.

files.title: File Management
files.description: Configure file upload limits, allowed file types, and storage settings.
files.maxUploadSizeDesc: Maximum file size allowed for uploads in megabytes.
files.allowedPhotoTypesDesc: Select which image formats can be uploaded as vehicle photos.
files.allowedAttachmentTypesDesc: Select which file formats can be uploaded as document attachments.
files.windowStickerDesc: Configure window sticker (Monroney label) upload and OCR processing.
files.enableWindowStickerDesc: Allow users to upload window stickers for automatic data extraction.
files.enableOCRDesc: Automatically extract pricing and specification data from uploaded window stickers.

integrations.nhtsaDesc: Automatic vehicle recall checking via the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration.
integrations.enableNHTSADesc: Check for vehicle recalls using the NHTSA database.
integrations.enableAutoCheckDesc: Automatically check for new recalls on a scheduled interval.
integrations.recallCheckIntervalDesc: How often to automatically check for new recalls.
integrations.nhtsaApiUrlDesc: The NHTSA API endpoint for recall lookups. Only change if using a proxy or custom endpoint.
integrations.testNHTSADesc: Tests connectivity to the NHTSA API by decoding a sample VIN.
integrations.nhtsaTestFailed: Failed to connect to the NHTSA API. Check the URL and try again.
integrations.carComplaintsDesc: Links to consumer complaint data for your vehicles.
integrations.enableCarComplaintsDesc: Add links to CarComplaints.com for researching known vehicle issues.
integrations.shopFinderDesc: Configure point-of-interest providers for finding nearby auto shops and service centers.
integrations.livelinkDesc: Real-time vehicle telemetry via WiCAN PRO OBD2 devices.
integrations.firmwareUpdate: Firmware update available for one or more devices
integrations.configureDesc: Manage WiCAN devices, MQTT settings, and telemetry parameters.

notifications.testFailed: Failed to send test notification via {{service}}

misc.title: ntfy Configuration
misc.subtitle: Self-hosted or ntfy.sh push notifications
misc.serverUrlHint: URL of your ntfy server (e.g., https://ntfy.sh or self-hosted)
misc.topicHint: Subscribe to this topic in your ntfy app to receive notifications
misc.apiTokenHint: Required for authenticated topics or self-hosted servers with auth
misc.securityTipBody: Use unique, hard-to-guess topic names for private notifications. ntfy.sh topics are public by default unless you enable authentication.

misc.title: Gotify Configuration
misc.subtitle: Self-hosted push notification server
misc.appTokenHint: Create an application in Gotify and copy the token
misc.setupNote: Gotify is a self-hosted notification server. Create an application in your Gotify dashboard to get a token.

misc.title: Pushover Configuration
misc.subtitle: Cross-platform push notifications
misc.apiTokenHint: Create an application at pushover.net to get a token
misc.setupNote: Pushover requires a one-time $5 purchase per platform (iOS, Android, Desktop). Visit pushover.net to set up your account and create an application.

misc.title: Slack Configuration
misc.subtitle: Send notifications to a Slack channel
misc.webhookUrlHint: Create an Incoming Webhook in your Slack workspace
misc.step1: Go to your Slack workspace settings
misc.step3: Create a new webhook and select a channel

misc.title: Discord Configuration
misc.subtitle: Send notifications to a Discord channel
misc.webhookUrlHint: Create a webhook in your Discord channel settings
misc.step1: Right-click on the channel you want notifications in

misc.title: Telegram Configuration
misc.subtitle: Send notifications via Telegram bot
misc.chatIdHint: Your user ID, group ID, or channel ID
misc.step4: Start a chat with your bot
misc.groupsNote: For groups/channels, add your bot to the group and use the group chat ID (starts with -).

misc.title: Email Configuration
misc.subtitle: Send notifications via SMTP email
misc.smtpPasswordHint: For Gmail, use an App Password (not your regular password)
misc.gmailNote: For Gmail, enable 2FA and create an App Password in your Google Account settings.

defLow.label: DEF Level Low
defLow.description: Notify when diesel exhaust fluid (DEF) level falls to or below the threshold

card.subtitle: Choose which events trigger notifications
card.enableServiceFirstFull: Enable at least one notification service to configure event notifications.
card.recallsDesc: Notify when NHTSA recalls are found for your vehicles
card.serviceDueDesc: Notify when scheduled service is coming due
card.serviceOverdueDesc: Notify when service is past due
card.milestonesDesc: Notify when reaching significant mileage milestones (e.g., 100k miles)
card.retryAttemptsDesc: Max retries for urgent/high priority events
card.retryNote: Retries only apply to urgent/high priority events (recalls, overdue service, expiring insurance)

backup.settingsBackupDesc: Back up and restore your application settings as JSON files.
backup.noSettingsBackups: No settings backups yet. Create one to get started.
backup.fullDataBackupDesc: Back up your entire database, photos, documents, and attachments.
backup.noFullBackups: No full backups yet. Create one to get started.

timeFormat.label: Time Format
timeFormat.description: Choose how times are displayed throughout the app.

widgetKeys.revealWarningDesc: This is the only time it will be shown. If you lose it, revoke this key and create a new one.
widgetKeys.nameHelp: A label to help you identify this key later.
widgetKeys.scopeAllDesc: Key sees every vehicle you currently own. New vehicles are included automatically.
widgetKeys.scopeSelectedDesc: Pick the exact vehicles this key is allowed to read.
widgetKeys.noVehicles: You don't own any vehicles yet.

panel.title: API Keys
panel.description: Read-only API keys for external integrations. Each key grants access to the vehicles you select.
panel.authRequiredDesc: Switch auth mode to {{localMode}} or {{oidcMode}} in the system settings to enable.
panel.noKeysYet: No API keys yet. Create one to start polling your garage from a dashboard.

integrationsTab.aboutCarComplaintsBody: CarComplaints.com provides a database of consumer complaints, common problems, and issue trends for vehicles. This integration adds convenient links to research known issues for your specific vehicle make, model, and year.
integrationsTab.carComplaintsVehicleNote: This integration is only available for cars and trucks, not RVs, trailers, or fifth wheels.
integrationsTab.aboutLiveLinkBody: LiveLink connects WiCAN PRO OBD2 devices to MyGarage for real-time vehicle telemetry. Track engine parameters, detect drive sessions, and receive diagnostic trouble code alerts.
integrationsTab.livelinkFirmwareRequirement: WiCAN PRO with firmware v4.40 or newer

backupTab.confirmRestoreFull: WARNING: This will overwrite your entire database and all uploaded files! A safety backup will be created first. Are you absolutely sure?
backupTab.confirmRestoreSettings: This will restore all settings from the backup. A safety backup will be created first. Continue?
backupTab.fullRestoreComplete: Full backup restored! Please refresh the page or restart the application for changes to take effect.
backupTab.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{filename}}?
backupTab.infoIncludesEverything: Full backups include your entire database and all uploaded files
backupTab.infoSizeDepends: Backup size depends on the amount of photos and documents you have uploaded
backupTab.infoRestoreOverwrites: Restoring a full backup will OVERWRITE all current data and files
backupTab.infoSafetyBackup: A safety backup is automatically created before any restore operation
backupTab.infoRestartRequired: Application restart may be required after restoring a full backup

filesTab.aboutWindowStickersBody: Window stickers (Monroney labels) are federally mandated labels on new vehicles showing MSRP, fuel economy, standard equipment, and optional features. Upload your vehicle's window sticker to automatically populate pricing and specification data.
filesTab.windowStickerVehicleNote: Window stickers are only available for passenger cars and trucks, not RVs, trailers, or fifth wheels.

fuel.title: Fuel Tracking Defaults
fuel.description: Pre-fill these fields when adding a new fuel record. Leave blank to start every entry empty.

accent.label: Accent Color
accent.description: Changes the accent color across the entire app.
